topic: Anxiety lives in your gut — not your head
caption:
Did you know anxiety might not be all in your head? 🤯 Recent studies show a strong link between gut health and mental wellbeing. 🌟 Here are 5 facts: 
1️⃣ 90% of serotonin is produced in the gut. 
2️⃣ Gut bacteria influence mood and cognitive function. 
3️⃣ Stress alters gut microbiome composition. 
4️⃣ Certain probiotics can reduce anxiety symptoms. 
5️⃣ A healthy gut barrier is crucial for mental health. 🧬
Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you 💚 #GutHealthMatters #AnxietyAwareness #MentalHealth #GutBrainAxis #ProbioticsForAnxiety #HealthyGutHappyMind
